_doc: M13 run config for a larger bounded Agents-A1 shadow workload against the ALREADY-SERVED llama-swap endpoint on fred. PLACEHOLDER, no secrets. The agent CALLS this endpoint; it never serves models.

endpoint._model_doc: llama-swap serves InternScience/Agents-A1-Q8_0-GGUF on fred's dual 3090s. A GGUF chat endpoint returns OUTPUT TEXT ONLY — no router logits — so records set telemetry_missing=true + policy=null; features are never fabricated.

batch._doc: Bounded larger run. size is this run's cap; cap is the hard maximum this config permits.

verifiers._doc: Reuse the verifier toggles. self_consistency_samples=1 → one endpoint call per task (bounds the run); self-consistency is skipped at n<2.

escalation._doc: Reuse M10/M12 thresholds. Advisory only; never sets a human outcome.

resume._doc: Resume/retry-safe: on re-run, prompt_ids already in the run log are skipped; only missing tasks are appended.

run._doc: deterministic=true → placeholder timestamps for reproducible committed samples. mode dry-run needs no network; the M13 live run injects a capped live model_fn against the running agents-a1 endpoint.
run._paths_doc: All default outputs are under the gitignored private dir — raw task/output text stays local. Commit only aggregate-only artifacts.
